entries.definition:
dh–q–n chin, beard; to place the hand under the chin, to hit on the chin; to annoy. Of this root, أَذْقَان adhqān, occurs three times in the Qur’an
أَذْقَان adhqān [pl. of n. ذَقَن dhaqan] chins (36:8) إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِي أَعْنَاقِهِمْ أَغْلَالًا فَهِيَ إِلَى الْأَذْقَانِ We have placed fetters on their necks, right up to their chins; *(17:109) يَخِرُّونَ لِلْأَذْقَانِ they fall down on their faces, they prostrate themselves [lit. they fall to the chins].

أَذْقَان adhqān [pl. of n. ذَقَن dhaqan] chins (36:8) إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِي أَعْنَاقِهِمْ أَغْلَالًا فَهِيَ إِلَى الْأَذْقَانِ We have placed fetters on their necks, right up to their chins; *(17:109) يَخِرُّونَ لِلْأَذْقَانِ they fall down on their faces, they prostrate themselves [lit. they fall to the chins].
